description: Financial Institution Credit Transfer: Debtor must identify as a Financial Institution (FinInstnId). customer elements like Nm, OrgId, PrvtId are not allowed.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Dbtr.Nm') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Dbtr.Id.OrgId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Dbtr.Id.PrvtId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Financial Institution Credit Transfer: Creditor must identify as a Financial Institution (FinInstnId). customer elements like Nm, OrgId, PrvtId are not allowed.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Cdtr.Nm') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Cdtr.Id.OrgId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Cdtr.Id.PrvtId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Financial Institution Credit Transfer: Instructing Agent must be a Financial Institution Identification.
Financial Institution Credit Transfer: Instructed Agent must be a Financial Institution Identification.
Instructing Agent (InstgAgt): Elements 'Nm', 'PstlAdr', 'Othr', 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.FinInstnId.Nm') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.FinInstnId.PstlAdr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Instructed Agent (InstdAgt): Elements 'Nm', 'PstlAdr', 'Othr', 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.FinInstnId.Nm') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.FinInstnId.PstlAdr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Intermediary Agent 1 (IntrmyAgt1): Elements 'Othr' and 'BrnchId' are not allowed inside FinInstnId as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt1.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt1.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt1.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Intermediary Agent 2 (IntrmyAgt2): Elements 'Othr' and 'BrnchId' are not allowed inside FinInstnId as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt2.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt2.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt2.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Intermediary Agent 3 (IntrmyAgt3): Elements 'Othr' and 'BrnchId' are not allowed inside FinInstnId as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt3.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt3.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt3.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Ultimate Debtor (UltmtDbtr): Element is not allowed as per MyStandards.
expression: all('.UltmtDbtr' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Ultimate Creditor (UltmtCdtr): Element is not allowed as per MyStandards.
expression: all('.UltmtCdtr' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Debtor (Dbtr): Elements 'ClrSysId/Prtry', 'Othr', and 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.Dbtr.FinInstnId.ClrSysMmbId.ClrSysId.Prtry' not in k and '.Dbtr.FinInstnId.Othr' not in k and '.Dbtr.FinInstnId.BrnchId' not in k and '.Dbtr.BrnchId' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Debtor Agent (DbtrAgt): Elements 'ClrSysId/Prtry', 'Othr', and 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.DbtrAgt.FinInstnId.ClrSysMmbId.ClrSysId.Prtry' not in k and '.DbtrAgt.FinInstnId.Othr' not in k and '.DbtrAgt.FinInstnId.BrnchId' not in k and '.DbtrAgt.BrnchId' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Creditor Agent (CdtrAgt): Elements 'ClrSysId/Prtry', 'Othr', and 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.CdtrAgt.FinInstnId.ClrSysMmbId.ClrSysId.Prtry' not in k and '.CdtrAgt.FinInstnId.Othr' not in k and '.CdtrAgt.FinInstnId.BrnchId' not in k and '.CdtrAgt.BrnchId' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Creditor (Cdtr): Elements 'ClrSysId/Prtry', 'Othr', and 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.Cdtr.FinInstnId.ClrSysMmbId.ClrSysId.Prtry' not in k and '.Cdtr.FinInstnId.Othr' not in k and '.Cdtr.FinInstnId.BrnchId' not in k and '.Cdtr.BrnchId' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Instruction For Next Agent (InstrForNxtAgt): Element 'Cd' (Instruction Code) is not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009. Only 'InstrInf' should be used.
expression: all('.InstrForNxtAgt.Cd' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Underlying Customer Credit Transfer (UndrlygCstmrCdtTrf): Element is not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.UndrlygCstmrCdtTrf' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Supplementary Data (SplmtryData): Element is not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.SplmtryData' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Settlement Method (SttlmMtd): Invalid value. Allowed: INDA, INGA, CLRG, COVE.
expression: VALUE in ['INDA', 'INGA', 'CLRG', 'COVE']

description: Instruction Priority (InstrPrty): Invalid value. Allowed: HIGH, NORM.
expression: VALUE in ['HIGH', 'NORM']

description: Clearing Channel (ClrChanl): Invalid value. Allowed: RTGS.
expression: VALUE == 'RTGS'

description: Charge Bearer (ChrgBr): Invalid value. Allowed: DEBT, CRED, SHAR, SLEV.
expression: VALUE in ['DEBT', 'CRED', 'SHAR', 'SLEV']

description: Duplicate Transaction ID (TxId) detected.
expression: len([k for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.TxId') and DATA[k] == VALUE]) == 1

description: Duplicate UETR detected.
expression: len([k for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.UETR') and DATA[k] == VALUE]) == 1

description: Clearing System T2: Settlement currency must be EUR.
condition: any(k.endswith('.ClrSysId.Cd') and DATA[k] == 'T2' for k in DATA.keys())
expression: all(DATA[k] == 'EUR' for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('@Ccy') and ('IntrBkSttlmAmt' in k or 'InstdAmt' in k))

description: Clearing System CHIPS: Settlement currency must be USD.
condition: any(k.endswith('.ClrSysId.Cd') and DATA[k] == 'CHIPS' for k in DATA.keys())
expression: all(DATA[k] == 'USD' for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('@Ccy') and ('IntrBkSttlmAmt' in k or 'InstdAmt' in k))

description: Clearing System FED: Settlement currency must be USD.
condition: any(k.endswith('.ClrSysId.Cd') and DATA[k] == 'FED' for k in DATA.keys())
expression: all(DATA[k] == 'USD' for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('@Ccy') and ('IntrBkSttlmAmt' in k or 'InstdAmt' in k))

description: Empty tags or whitespace-only elements are not allowed.
expression: all(DATA[k].strip() != '' for k in DATA.keys() if isinstance(DATA[k], str) and not k.endswith('@Ccy'))
